case_for: Allen has cleared 12+ points in four of his last six games, including three straight games above 20 points, showing he's a focal point of the passing offense with high weekly upside.
case_against: His two floor performances this season (8.1 and 6.0 points) show he can be shut down or limited to a low-value role in unfavorable game scripts, capping his floor below the threshold.
